embed.description:
# [BebraLand rules]({rules_url}) 
BebraLand keeps rules simple: enjoy the server, and do not ruin the experience for other players.

The website is the official source of truth for the full rules.

fields.name: Not allowed
fields.value:
- Griefing, theft, cheating, or sabotage
- Item duplication, except Dragon Egg and TNT duplicators
- Lag machines or intentionally harmful redstone
- PvP without consent
- Slurs, offensive symbols, extremist or illegal content

fields.name: Important notes
fields.value:
- General insults are discouraged, but slurs are fully prohibited
- Items lost on normal deaths are not returned by moderation
- Punishments depend on severity: warning, temporary ban, or permanent ban
